lessons.title: Auto Memory: Taming the 200-Line MEMORY.md Limit
lessons.summary: How to structure Claude Code's auto memory system using topic files and the capture-promote-prune cycle to stay under the 200-line MEMORY.md limit.

lessons.title: Hooks: Auto-Format, Audit, and Gate Every Tool Call
lessons.summary: How to use preTool and postTool hooks in Claude Code settings to auto-format code, log tool usage, and block dangerous operations.
